I've had a great experience using Groww. The app is simple, user-friendly, and makes investing in stocks, mutual funds, and IPOs very convenient, even for beginners. The interface is clean, transactions are smooth, and account management is hassle-free. I also appreciate the timely notifications, easy-to-understand investment insights, and quick customer support. Overall, Groww is a reliable platform for anyone looking to start or grow their investment journey. Highly recommended!

Your app is really good, but it is lacking international markets. I want to invest in American and Japanese stocks as well. There is no AI in your app, which is a must have feature. AI would provide different options strategies, detailed analysis of stocks, and company earnings analysis. Nowadays, I have stopped reading earnings reports and rely on AI for that. Also, please add AI alerts for stocks that give instant notifications about any news regarding a stock.Include Multibagger screener ^_^
nice investment app try for you

In my experience, Groww is better for mutual fund investors than active traders. The trading charges and overall costs feel higher compared to platforms like Zerodha and Angel One. If you are a serious trader, there are better alternatives available. However, for long-term mutual fund investing, Groww is simple and easy to use.

Overall okay. If I set a trigger order it is valid for a year but if my funds are not used for some time you guys refund it without asking. The trigger order will then never go through. How can I navigate this?

Great app overall. One feature that would make Groww even better is an Investment Costing Summary on the Sell page. Please show: • Buy Date • Holding Period • Total Buy Cost • Current Value • Estimated Sell Charges • Net Amount Receivable • Actual Profit/Loss • Return % Investors should be able to see their complete profit calculation in one place without opening reports or contract notes. This would make the app much more user-friendly and transparent. Thanks.

అంతా బానే ఉంది కానీ నాకు ఒక్క డిసప్పాయింట్ ఉంది కమోడిటీ లోని ఆప్షన్ కాంటాక్ట్ ఎక్స్పైరీ రోజు రాత్రి 10.30 వరకే ట్రేడింగ్ చేయడానికి సమయం ఇస్తున్నారు 11 తర్వాత ఆక్టివ్ పొజిషన్స్ ఆటో స్క్వేర్ ఆఫ్ చేస్తున్నారు ఇది చాలా బాధాకరమైన విషయం మిగతా ట్రేడింగ్ యాప్ లలో క్లోసింగ్ వరకు సమయం ఇస్తారు

Very disappointing experience with Groww and Axis Mutual Fund. During a financial emergency, Groww asked me to contact Axis, while Axis asked me to go back to Groww. For over two weeks, both kept shifting responsibility instead of helping. The lack of accountability and customer support was frustrating. Based on my experience, I would not recommend using Groww for investments and would advise investors to be careful and don't invest in Axis Mutual Fund.

Groww was great, now many bugs visible as we trade. like: OFS(offer for sale )option is not there only!!, and many MF are missing, and many important financial ratios are missing, and most important 👉few GTT orders dont show also in "all orders" list. The Order list filter is full of bugs. have complained and showed them recording also, but no action.
